headline: Nest's quest to fix your thermostat
summary: Tony Fadell, iPhone co-creator, founded Nest to revolutionize home thermostats. Nest's origin story is a classic tech myth. He was inspired to innovate after a personal experience.

headline: Ad-free streaming is a luxury now
summary: Streaming once offered an ad-free escape from traditional cable TV. Ad-free streaming has now become a premium, luxury feature. The industry shift includes more widespread ad-supported tiers.

headline: TMD’s keyless bike lock is a $280 solution to a $60 problem
summary: The TMD Chain Lock is a 'smart' keyless bike security solution. Priced at $280, it's significantly more expensive than standard locks. The review questions if its features justify the high cost.

headline: Teenage Engineering adds lo-fi mode, USB audio, and more to its KO II sampler
summary: Teenage Engineering released OS 2.5 for its EP-133 KO II sampler. The update adds USB audio, selectable lo-fi sample rates, and sample reverse. New features significantly enhance the sampler's capabilities and flexibility.

headline: The Invincible VS Devs Would Love a Mortal Kombat Crossover
summary: Developers behind Invincible VS are open to various genre and IP collaborations. They've expressed strong interest in a potential Mortal Kombat crossover. This could bring iconic fighting game characters to their universe.

headline: GTA 6 Scalpers Are Finding Buyers on eBay Despite Rockstar's Commitment to a Digital Release
summary: eBay scalpers are selling 'pre-order' copies of GTA 6 for inflated prices. Buyers are paying extra despite Rockstar's confirmed digital-only release. These scalped listings offer no practical benefit to consumers.

headline: Street Fighter 6 Devs Have No Current Plans to Make Any Major Adjustments to System Mechanics | Evo 2026
summary: Street Fighter 6 developers confirmed no major changes to system mechanics are planned. Director Nakayama and Producer Matsumoto shared updates at Evo 2026. The team remains focused on the game's current design and future content.

headline: Supergirl Director Credits James Gunn for Helping Choose Song for Much-Discussed Slow-Motion Fight Scene
summary: Director Craig Gillespie credits DC Studios co-CEO James Gunn for song selection. The chosen song was used in a widely discussed slow-motion Supergirl fight scene. The sequence generated significant buzz across social media platforms.

headline: Two boys rescued from Venezuela earthquake rubble after days of being trapped
summary: Two young boys were successfully rescued from earthquake rubble in Venezuela. Rescuers spent six hours meticulously digging to free one child. Many residents are still searching by hand, awaiting heavy machinery.

headline: I hear my son crying beneath the rubble, says Venezuela earthquake survivor
summary: Andreina Valerio, a Venezuelan earthquake survivor, hears her son crying beneath collapsed debris. Her son, partner, and in-laws are trapped under a fallen building. Families desperately await help and heavy equipment to arrive.

headline: Eleven killed after plane carrying skydivers crashes in eastern France
summary: A plane transporting skydivers crashed tragically in eastern France. The incident resulted in the deaths of eleven individuals. Local officials confirmed the pilot and 10 passengers perished.

headline: World Cup knockouts are here - what is England's path to the final?
summary: England has successfully qualified for the World Cup knockout stages. BBC Sport is analyzing their potential route to the tournament final. Fans are eagerly anticipating their journey through the competition.
